content_body:
Happy New Year!

The wife and I spent our 27th wedding anniversary and brought in the New Year in this great cabin. Everything was as fun as expected! Beautiful, scenic yard and views. Enjoyed town and the Scenic Railway. We will be back! It was strangly warm for this time of year. I missed my "Snow Fix" haha. Maybe next time. Thanks for the accomodations! Tell the Fly fishing company and family Thanks again!!
title: We will be back!
